title: PARENTING TIME CALCULATION ENGINE
subtitle: Days Lost, Time Owed, and Michigan Law Requirements

calculations.source: Michigan Friend of the Court parenting time guidelines

calculations.metric: Percentage of L.D.W.'s Life Without Father
calculations.impact: DEVASTATING — developmental psychology literature is clear on harm

calculations.authority: MCL 722.27a(8) — court SHALL provide make-up time
calculations.note: Make-up time is MANDATORY, not discretionary

calculations.value: Thanksgiving 2025, Christmas 2025, New Year 2026, Easter 2026, July 4 2026
calculations.impact: Each missed holiday is an additional deprivation
Father absent from critical milestone — irreversible harm

legal_framework.text: Parenting time shall be granted in frequency/duration/type reasonably calculated to promote strong relationship
legal_framework.application: PRESUMPTION of parenting time — suspension requires extraordinary findings

legal_framework.text: Court may SUSPEND parenting time ONLY if clear and convincing evidence of danger
legal_framework.application: No such finding was made — Emily's ex-parte order was procedurally defective

legal_framework.text: Parenting time denied ONLY if preponderance shows child's physical/mental/emotional health endangered
legal_framework.application: No evidence of any danger from Andrew — burden is on Emily

legal_framework.text: Court SHALL provide make-up time for wrongfully denied parenting time
legal_framework.application: 45 overnights of make-up time are MANDATORY

legal_framework.text: Domestic relations referees may conduct investigations
legal_framework.application: Request independent investigation of parenting time fitness

legal_framework.text: Parental liberty is a fundamental constitutional right
legal_framework.application: Strict scrutiny applies to complete deprivation of parenting time

arguments_for_restoration: L.D.W. has been denied ALL contact with father for 230 days
This represents 18.8% of L.D.W.'s entire life
Standard parenting time of 45 overnights has been wrongfully denied
No clear and convincing evidence of danger was ever presented (MCL 722.27a(3))
Emily's ex-parte motion lacked required statutory findings
Developmental psychology research unanimously shows harm from parental absence at this age
Make-up time of 45 overnights is MANDATORY under MCL 722.27a(8)
Continued separation causes irreversible attachment damage — immediate restoration is essential
